title: hedlundia neglecta
intro: Hedlundia neglecta is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy. It has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Hedlundia neglecta can be prepared in herbal tea or tincture form, often used to treat digestive issues and other health concerns.
